title: tephrosia hochstetteri
intro: Tephrosia hochstetteri, also known as the yellow pea tree, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant's medicinal properties are derived from its roots, which contain alkaloids and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia hochstetteri include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia hochstetteri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
